purpose: PR #563 confirmatory: prove the min_tokens=8 EOS-guard (wirbel #541) is a mechanical no-op on these CoT tasks. The full sampled sweep ran WITHOUT it; empty_rate=0 across all 16 sweep cells means the guard (which only masks EOS to rescue immediate-EOS empties) cannot have changed any cell. This re-runs the seed-0 MMLU-Pro + GPQA cells on BOTH arms WITH --min-tokens 8.

verdict.interpretation: min_tokens=8 never fired (empty_rate=0 everywhere). The +-1..4-question cell deltas are vLLM continuous-batching run-to-run nondeterminism (separate server instance/batch schedule -> FP reduction-order token flips), NOT a guard effect. The 3-seed-sweep verdict (gate_holds_under_sampling=true) is unaffected.
